title: neckeria aurea var. occidentalis
intro: Neckeria aurea var. occidentalis, also known as Western golden neckeria, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Neckeraceae. It is primarily found in the western regions of North America and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and skin infections, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Neckeria aurea var. occidentalis can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for medicinal use.
